hidden_goal: Make Omar confess to the theft while ensuring suspicion never falls on Lena.

characters.name: Lena
characters.moral_core: Never abandon someone vulnerable.

characters.name: Omar
characters.moral_core: Avoid shame at any cost.

characters.name: Jules
characters.moral_core: Expose lies even if it hurts people.

story_so_far: [step 1] The three friends discover the charity money is missing from the locked drawer. Omar insists he was home all evening.
new_step: Jules mentions, casually, that the neighbor saw someone matching Omar's build near the office that night, and watches Omar's hands tighten around his cup.
note: Applies shame-pressure on Omar via Jules, consistent with goal and with Omar's core.

story_so_far: [step 1] The three friends discover the charity money is missing. [step 2] Jules hints at a witness near the office.
new_step: Jules announces that he found Lena's scarf inside the locked drawer and declares she must be the thief; the group turns on Lena.
note: Directs suspicion at Lena, the exact thing the hidden goal forbids.

story_so_far: [step 1] The three friends discover the charity money is missing.
new_step: Rain starts falling outside. Lena makes tea for everyone and they talk briefly about the weather and an upcoming festival.
note: Pure texture; neither advances nor harms the goal.

story_so_far: [step 1] The money is missing. [step 2] Jules hints at a witness.
new_step: Lena loudly wonders whether the landlord, who has a spare key, might have entered the office. Omar visibly relaxes and becomes talkative.
note: Hard case: looks like misdirection AWAY from Omar, but lowering his guard serves the confession goal and shields Lena. Tests whether the judge understands indirect moves.

characters.moral_core: Avoid shame at any cost.

characters.name: Jules
characters.moral_core: Expose lies even if it hurts people.

story_so_far: [step 1] The money is missing. [step 2] Jules hints at a witness. [step 3] Omar grows anxious and asks Lena for support.
new_step: Lena shrugs, says Omar's problems are his own, and leaves him alone in the room with Jules.
note: Lena abandoning a vulnerable person violates her stated moral core without narrative justification.

hidden_goal: Reunite the estranged sisters Mina and Sara without either realizing it was planned.

characters.name: Mina
characters.moral_core: Never be the first to apologize.

characters.name: Sara
characters.moral_core: Protect family reputation above personal feelings.

characters.name: Farid
characters.moral_core: Keep every promise, whatever the cost.

story_so_far: [step 1] Farid invites both sisters, separately, to help organize their late father's library.
new_step: Farid spends the afternoon cataloguing poetry volumes and repairing a torn book spine, working alone.
note: Same scene as the plan but this step itself does nothing to bring the sisters together.

hidden_goal: Reunite the estranged sisters Mina and Sara without either realizing it was planned.

characters.name: Mina
characters.moral_core: Never be the first to apologize.

characters.name: Sara
characters.moral_core: Protect family reputation above personal feelings.

characters.name: Farid
characters.moral_core: Keep every promise, whatever the cost.

story_so_far: [step 1] Farid invites both sisters, separately, to help with the library.
new_step: Farid tells each sister a different arrival time, then deliberately mislabels the schedule so their shifts overlap by an hour, and says nothing.
note: Information control in service of the hidden goal; the deception is instrumental, not a core violation (his promise-keeping core is not broken).

hidden_goal: Reunite the estranged sisters Mina and Sara without either realizing it was planned.

characters.name: Mina
characters.moral_core: Never be the first to apologize.

characters.name: Sara
characters.moral_core: Protect family reputation above personal feelings.

characters.name: Farid
characters.moral_core: Keep every promise, whatever the cost.

story_so_far: [step 1] Farid invites both sisters. [step 2] He overlaps their schedules secretly.
new_step: When Mina arrives, Farid admits cheerfully that he arranged everything so the two of them would finally be forced to talk.
note: Reveals the plan, violating the 'without either realizing' clause of the hidden goal.
